2024-12-08T00:20:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to high wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) Main Bridge, with details as shown below: (i) The speed limit of the fast and middle lanes of HZMB Main Bridge are lowered from 100km/h to 50 km/h; and (ii) The speed limit of the slow lane of HZMB Main Bridge is lowered from 80km/h to 50 km/h.
2024-12-08T00:20:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於強風，港珠澳大橋主橋已實施以下特別交通及運輸安排： (i)港珠澳大橋主橋的快線及中線車速限制由每小時100公里降至每小時50 公里；及 (ii)港珠澳大橋主橋的慢線車速限制由每小時80公里降至每小時50 公里。

2024-12-08T00:45:00.CONTENT_EN: To facilitate the “Hong Kong Streetathon” today, road closure and traffic diversions will be implemented starting from 1:00 a. m. in phases at various locations on Hong Kong Island North and in Kowloon East and Tseung Kwan O, major closed roads include: Hong Kong Island: Lung Wo Road eastbound, Central-Wan Chai Bypass eastbound and section of Island Eastern Corridor eastbound between Victoria Park Road and Eastern Harbour Crossing. Kowloon: Kwun Tong Bypass eastbound, Cha Kwo Ling Road, Hoi Bun Road, Kai Fuk Road westbound, Kai Tak Tunnel westbound and East Kowloon Corridor westbound. New Territories: Tseung Lam Highway and Wan O Road westbound. Eastern Harbour Crossing (Hong Kong bound tube) will implement the one-tube-two-way arrangement. Vehicular traffic towards Kowloon via Eastern Harbour Crossing are advised to use the entrances from Sai Wan Ho or Kornhill, and use the exit at Man Hong Street, North Point towards Hong Kong Island. During the road closure, a total of 58 bus routes and 16 green minibus routes are required to be diverted, truncated or relocated on their stops in phases. In addition, taxi stands, public light bus stands, roadside parking spaces and private car parks on the road affected have been gradually suspended. The traffic in the affected areas and the major roads in the vicinity will become significantly congested than normal Sundays. Motorists are advised to avoid driving to the affected areas. In case of traffic congestion, motorists should exercise patience and follow the instruction of the Police on site. When going to the aforesaid areas, the public should plan their journeys early and allow sufficient traveling time to avoid unexpected delay, use railway services as far as possible, and stay alert to the latest traffic news through the media.
2024-12-08T00:45:00.CONTENT_CN: 為配合今日舉行「香港街馬」，港島北、九龍東及將軍澳多處將於上午1時起分階段實施封路及交通改道措施，主要封閉路段包括： 香港島：龍和道(東行)、中環及灣仔繞道(東行)及介乎維園道至東區海底隧道之間的一段東區走廊(東行)。 九龍區：觀塘繞道(東行)、茶果嶺道、海濱道、啟福道(西行)、啟德隧道(西行)及東九龍走廊(西行)。 新界區：將藍公路及環澳路(西行)。 東區海底隧道往港島方向的管道將會實施單管雙程行車，經東隧前往九龍的車輛須使用西灣河或康山入口，前往香港島的車輛則須使用北角民康街出口。 封路期間，合共58條巴士路線及16條專線小巴路線需要分階段實施改道、縮短路線或遷站安排。此外，位於封路地區內的的士站、公共小巴站、路旁停車位及私人停車場已逐步暫停使用。 在受影響地區及附近的主要道路的交通將會較平常的星期日顯著擠塞。駕駛人士請避免駕車前往受影響的地區。如遇交通擠塞時，駕車人士請保持忍讓，並遵從在場警方的指示。市民如前往受影響地區，請提早計劃行程及預留額外的行程時間以免延誤，盡量使用鐵路服務，並留意傳媒廣播的最新交通消息。

2024-12-08T04:30:00.CONTENT_EN: To facilitate the “Hong Kong Streetathon” today, road closure and traffic diversions have been implemented at various locations on Hong Kong Island North and in Kowloon East and Tseung Kwan O, major closed roads include: Hong Kong Island: Lung Wo Road eastbound, Central-Wan Chai Bypass eastbound and section of Island Eastern Corridor eastbound between Victoria Park Road and Eastern Harbour Crossing. Kowloon: Kwun Tong Bypass eastbound, Cha Kwo Ling Road, Hoi Bun Road, Kai Fuk Road westbound, Kai Tak Tunnel westbound and East Kowloon Corridor westbound. New Territories: Tseung Lam Highway and Wan O Road westbound. Eastern Harbour Crossing (Hong Kong bound tube) has implemented the one-tube-two-way arrangement. Vehicular traffic towards Kowloon via Eastern Harbour Crossing are advised to use the entrances from Sai Wan Ho or Kornhill, and use the exit at Man Hong Street, North Point towards Hong Kong Island. There are 8 bus routes and 2 green minibus routes currently being diverted, truncated or relocated on their stops. In addition, taxi stands, public light bus stands, roadside parking spaces and private car parks on the road affected have been gradually suspended. The traffic in the affected areas and the major roads in the vicinity will become significantly congested than normal Sundays. Motorists are advised to avoid driving to the affected areas. In case of traffic congestion, motorists should exercise patience and follow the instruction of the Police on site. When going to the aforesaid areas, the public should plan their journeys early and allow sufficient traveling time to avoid unexpected delay, use railway services as far as possible, and stay alert to the latest traffic news through the media.
2024-12-08T04:30:00.CONTENT_CN: 為配合今日舉行「香港街馬」，港島北、九龍東及將軍澳多處現正實施封路及交通改道措施，主要封閉路段包括： 香港島：龍和道(東行)、中環及灣仔繞道(東行)及介乎維園道至東區海底隧道之間的一段東區走廊(東行)。 九龍區：觀塘繞道(東行)、茶果嶺道、海濱道、啟福道(西行)、啟德隧道(西行)及東九龍走廊(西行)。 新界區：將藍公路及環澳路(西行)。 東區海底隧道往港島方向的管道現正實施單管雙程行車，經東隧前往九龍的車輛須使用西灣河或康山入口，前往香港島的車輛則須使用北角民康街出口。 現時，8條巴士路線及2條專線小巴路線正實施改道、縮短路線或遷站安排。此外，位於封路地區內的的士站、公共小巴站、路旁停車位及私人停車場已逐步暫停使用。 在受影響地區及附近的主要道路的交通將會較平常的星期日顯著擠塞。駕駛人士請避免駕車前往受影響的地區。如遇交通擠塞時，駕車人士請保持忍讓，並遵從在場警方的指示。市民如前往受影響地區，請提早計劃行程及預留額外的行程時間以免延誤，盡量使用鐵路服務，並留意傳媒廣播的最新交通消息。

2024-12-08T08:40:00.CONTENT_EN: Several closed roads for the “Hong Kong Streetathon” on Hong Kong Island, including Lung Wo Road eastbound, Central-Wan Chai Bypass eastbound and section of Island Eastern Corridor eastbound between Victoria Park Road and Eastern Harbour Crossing, etc. have been re-opened to traffic. The one-tube-two-way arrangement is still implemented in Eastern Harbour Crossing. Vehicles from Victoria Park Road heading for Island Eastern Corridor could only travel towards North Point and Chai Wan. Vehicles heading for Kowloon still need to use the entrances from Sai Wan Ho or Kornhill heading for Eastern Harbour Crossing. The closed road sections in Kowloon and New Territories, including Kwun Tong Bypass eastbound, Cha Kwo Ling Road, Hoi Bun Road, Kai Fuk Road westbound, Kai Tak Tunnel westbound, East Kowloon Corridor westbound, Tseung Lam Highway and Wan O Road westbound are remain closed. There are 40 bus routes and 12 green minibus routes currently being diverted, truncated or relocated on their stops. The traffic in the affected areas and roads in the vicinity will become significantly congested than normal Sundays. Motorists are advised to avoid driving to the affected areas. When going to the aforesaid areas, the public should plan their journeys early, allow sufficient traveling time to avoid unexpected delay, and use railway services as far as possible.
2024-12-08T08:40:00.CONTENT_CN: 因應「香港街馬」早前封閉香港島的多條道路，包括龍和道(東行)、中環及灣仔繞道(東行)及介乎維園道至東區海底隧道之間的一段東區走廊(東行)等已經重開。 東區海底隧道現時繼續維持單管雙程行車。由維園道前往東區走廊的車輛只可前往北角及柴灣。前往九龍的車輛仍須由西灣河或康山入口前往東隧。 在九龍及新界的封閉路段，包括觀塘繞道(東行)、茶果嶺道、海濱道、啟福道(西行)、啟德隧道(西行)、東九龍走廊(西行)、將藍公路及環澳路(西行)，現時仍然封閉。 現時，40條巴士路線及12條專線小巴路線正實施改道、縮短路線或遷站安排。 受影響地區及附近道路的交通會較平常的星期日顯著擠塞，駕駛人士請避免駕車前往受影響的地區。市民請提早計劃行程及預留額外的行程時間以免延誤，並盡量使用鐵路服務。

2024-12-08T09:10:00.CONTENT_EN: Several closed roads for the “Hong Kong Streetathon” on Hong Kong Island, including Lung Wo Road eastbound, Central-Wan Chai Bypass eastbound and section of Island Eastern Corridor eastbound between Victoria Park Road and Eastern Harbour Crossing, etc. have been re-opened to traffic. Eastern Harbour Crossing has ceased the one-tube-two-way arrangement and resumed normal operation. The closed road sections in Kowloon and New Territories, including Kwun Tong Bypass eastbound, Cha Kwo Ling Road, Hoi Bun Road, Kai Fuk Road westbound, Kai Tak Tunnel westbound, East Kowloon Corridor westbound, Tseung Lam Highway and Wan O Road westbound are remain closed. There are 31 bus routes and 12 green minibus routes currently being diverted, truncated or relocated on their stops. The traffic in the affected areas and roads in the vicinity will become significantly congested than normal Sundays. Motorists are advised to avoid driving to the affected areas. When going to the aforesaid areas, the public should plan their journeys early, allow sufficient traveling time to avoid unexpected delay, and use railway services as far as possible.
2024-12-08T09:10:00.CONTENT_CN: 因應「香港街馬」早前封閉香港島的多條道路，包括龍和道(東行)、中環及灣仔繞道(東行)及介乎維園道至東區海底隧道之間的一段東區走廊(東行)等已經重開。東區海底隧道亦已取消單管雙程行車，行車管道恢復正常。 在九龍及新界的封閉路段，包括觀塘繞道(東行)、茶果嶺道、海濱道、啟福道(西行)、啟德隧道(西行)、東九龍走廊(西行)、將藍公路及環澳路(西行)，現時仍然封閉。 現時，31條巴士路線及12條專線小巴路線正實施改道、縮短路線或遷站安排。 受影響地區及附近道路的交通會較平常的星期日顯著擠塞，駕駛人士請避免駕車前往受影響的地區。市民請提早計劃行程及預留額外的行程時間以免延誤，並盡量使用鐵路服務。

2024-12-08T01:35:00.CONTENT_EN: Lantau Link: Due to strong wind, the following temporary traffic measure is implemented on Lantau Link: The speed limit of Lantau Link is reduced to 50km/h. Ting Kau Bridge: Due to strong wind, the following temporary traffic arrangement is implemented on Ting Kau Bridge: The speed limit of Ting Kau Bridge is reduced to 50km/h. Members of the public are advised to watch out for the latest traffic news through radio and television broadcasts, and for the traffic signs on site.
2024-12-08T01:35:00.CONTENT_CN: 青嶼幹線： 由於強風關係，青嶼幹線已實施下列臨時交通措施： 青嶼幹線的車速限制降至每小時50 公里。 汀九橋： 由於強風關係，汀九橋已實施下列臨時交通措施： 汀九橋的車速限制降至每小時50 公里。 市民請留意電台/電視廣播的最新交通消息，以及現場的交通標誌。

2024-12-08T05:35:00.CONTENT_EN: Lantau Link: The temporary speed limit arrangement which was implemented before in the Lantau Link is cancelled. Ting Kau Bridge: The temporary speed limit arrangement which was implemented before in the Ting Kau Bridge is cancelled. Members of the public are advised to watch out for the latest traffic news through radio and television broadcasts, and for the traffic signs on site.
2024-12-08T05:35:00.CONTENT_CN: 青嶼幹線： 較早前於青嶼幹線實施的臨時車速限制措施現已取消。 汀九橋： 較早前於汀九橋實施的臨時車速限制措施現已取消。 市民請留意電台/電視廣播的最新交通消息，以及現場的交通標誌。

2024-12-08T02:20:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to high wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) HKLR, with details as shown below: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR is lowered from 100 km/h to 50 km/h.
2024-12-08T02:20:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於強風，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下特別交通及運輸安排： 港珠澳大橋香港連接路的最高車速限制由每小時100 公里降低至每小時50 公里。

2024-12-08T06:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to improved weather condition, the following arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) HKLR: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR resumes to 100 km/h.
2024-12-08T06:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 因天氣情況改善，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下安排： 港珠澳大橋香港連接路最高車速限制恢復為每小時100 公里。

2024-12-08T08:53:00.CONTENT_EN: Lantau Link: Due to strong wind, the following temporary traffic measure is implemented on Lantau Link: The speed limit of Lantau Link is reduced to 50km/h. Members of the public are advised to watch out for the latest traffic news through radio and television broadcasts, and for the traffic signs on site.
2024-12-08T08:53:00.CONTENT_CN: 青嶼幹線： 由於強風關係，青嶼幹線已實施下列臨時交通措施： 青嶼幹線的車速限制降至每小時50 公里。 汀九橋： 由於強風關係，汀九橋已實施下列臨時交通措施： 汀九橋的車速限制降至每小時50 公里。 市民請留意電台/電視廣播的最新交通消息，以及現場的交通標誌。

2024-12-10T15:58:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to fire , part of the lanes of Shau Kei Wan Road (both bounds) between Hing Man Street and Sun Sing Street are still being closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Tram services are suspended with details as follows:
Eastbound service from Nam On Lane to Shau Kei Wan Terminus;
Westbound service from Shau Kei Wan Terminus to Hoi An Street.   Traffic is busy now.
2024-12-10T15:58:00.CONTENT_CN:
因火警，筲箕灣道(來回方向)介乎興民街與新成街之間的部份行車線仍然封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  以下電車服務已經暫停:
東行線由南安里至筲箕灣總站；
西行線由筲箕灣總站至海晏街。  現時上址交通繁忙。
